programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.3m @ 8s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos might offer a few 1.3m ramps this morning, assuming the wind cooperates.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.3m @ 8s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos might offer a few 1.3m ramps this morning, assuming the wind cooperates.

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.3 meters and that period, it's a bodyboard-sized mess out there today.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s CROSS

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell and crosswind might offer something rideable, or just a good workout swimming back to shore.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell with onshore wind will likely provide some closeouts and a decent workout swimming.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.3 meter swell might offer a few closeouts before the wind claims them.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.3m and onshore breeze, it'll be a good day to practice getting washed in at Lagide.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.7m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 0.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 0.7m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
